zh.lifeSummary: 當Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice於1318年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里阿爾德福特時，她的父親Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw39歲，母親Slany O'Brien33歲。她和Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond至少有3個兒子。她去世於1358年3月14日在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice于1318年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克里阿爾德福特时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw39岁，母亲Slany O'Brien33岁。她和Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond至少有3个儿子。她去世于1358年3月14日在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Aveline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It seems to represent an Old French pet form of the Germanic name   Avila   (a derivative of   Avis  ), but it could also be an elaborated form of   Ava .

en.lifeSummary: When Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice was born in 1318, in Ardfert, County Kerry, Ireland, her father, Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw, was 39 and her mother, Slany O'Brien, was 33. She had at least 3 sons with Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond. She died on 14 March 1358, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice est née en 1318, à Ardfert, County Kerry, Irlande, son père, Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Slany O'Brien, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond. Elle est décédée le 14 mars 1358, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice 1318 in Ardfert, County Kerry, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw 39 und ihre Mutter Slany O'Brien 33. Sie hatte mit Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. März 1358 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice è nata il nel 1318 nel Ardfert, County Kerry, Irlanda, sua padre, Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Slany O'Brien, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond. Morì il 14 marzo 1358, nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMauriceが1318年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーアルドフエルトで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnawは39歳，母Slany O'Brienは33歳であった。彼女はEarl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmondとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1358年3月14日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice(이)가 1318년 아일랜드 카운티 케리 아드퍼트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Slany O'Brien(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 3월 14일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice nasceu em 1318, em Ardfert, County Kerry, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Slany O'Brien, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond. Ela faleceu em 14 de março de 1358, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice родилась в 1318 г. в местности ардфирт, коунти кирри, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Slany O'Brien, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond. Она умерла 14 марта 1358 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice nació en 1318, en Ardfert, County Kerry, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Nicholas fitzMaurice fitzThomas 3rd Baron of Kerry and Lixnaw, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Slany O'Brien, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1358, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 40 años.
